ideation: This sequence will depict a wish-making gesture, as if the robot is looking up at and making a wish upon a shooting star. It begins with both arms raised slightly, palms up, in anticipation. Then, one arm moves to make a wish, followed by a return to the original position.  The sequence will be short, sweet, and expressive. The other arm will remain largely static to focus attention on the wishing motion. I will use slight variations in joint angles to create the illusion of natural movement, avoiding overly rigid or mechanical motions. I'll use existing examples as a guide for range of motion and fluidity.

frames.beat: arms lift, palms up, anticipating a star
the left arm reaches up as if to catch a wish
both arms return to the hopeful, waiting pose
